text: I feel a quiet curiosity being here. The first scene reminds me of moments before an event begins—there's a kind of anticipation mixed with a touch of nervous energy, as people move about in preparation. In the second scene, the focused posture of the person reading the display draws me inward; I sense the allure of knowledge and discovery. Surrounded by exhibitions and thoughtful design, I am inspired to observe, reflect, and seek deeper understanding.
